nasb.text: For ground that drinks the rain which often falls on it and brings forth vegetation useful to those for whose sake it is also tilled, receives a blessing from God;

esv.text: For land that has drunk the rain that often falls on it, and produces a crop useful to those for whose sake it is cultivated, receives a blessing from God.

cnv.text: 這就像一塊地，吸收了常常下在它上面的雨水，如果長出對種植的人有用的菜蔬，就從　神那裡得福。

ccb.text: 一块经常受到雨水滋润的田地若为耕种的人长出庄稼来，就蒙上帝赐福；

csbs.text: 要知道，当一块田地吸收了常常降在它上面的雨水，并且为种地的人长出有用菜蔬时，它就享受从神而来的祝福；
